features: Stainless Steel Blades For A Close Shave When And Where You Need It Most
The slim fixed head is great for precision shaving in those notoriously hard-to-reach areas
The Slim Fixed Head Is Great For Precision Shaving In Those Notoriously Hard-To-Reach Areas
Stainless steel blades for a close shave when and where you need it most
description: Product Description BIC brand beauty products designed to pamper you, care for yourself and feel beautiful every day of the year. Directions 1. Remove the old cartridge from the razor handle. 2. Open the new cartridge package. 3. Insert the new cartridge into the razor handle until it clicks into place. 4. Prepare the razor by ensuring the blades are exposed and the cartridge is securely attached. 5. Shave in the direction of hair growth for a close and comfortable shave. 6. After use, dispose of the cartridge and clean the razor handle.
